Compliance.description: Fully licensed by SARB PA since 2017, FSP & NCRCP, Banking Assoc member, no major violations.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed; app ease praised, fraud complaints on Trustpilot/Google; 11M customers.

Product Value.description: Low/no fees, high savings, transparent, store access strong for low-income.

Innovation.description: Digital-only cloud, kiosks 3-min onboard, GoalSave, early pay, ID partnership.

Customer Support.description: Phone/WhatsApp/email; complaints of holds, drops, slow fraud resolution.

Accessibility & Security.description: App/digital access excellent, kiosks inclusive, POPIA compliant but fraud reports & KYC issues. Encrypted, biometrics.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: No monthly; ATM R10, card replace R100, decline R3, intl 2% FX

socialSentiment.summary: Praise for UI/fees; complaints fraud/support on reviews/social.
